benefits.description: Never been this lean; lost 19 pounds over the course of use
Sleep improved drastically, especially deep sleep
More motivation to stick with workouts; better oomph attributed partly to improved rest and recovery

protocol_notes: Ran sermorelin for a little over 8 months total (post title says 4 months but OP later clarifies ~8 months). Currently on a break for at least 4 months. On a 500 calorie deficit throughout. Chose sermorelin over CJC+Ipamorelin or exogenous HGH due to better safety profile and minimal impact on natural GH production. No changes in sleep quality or sides noted after stopping.
